extracted_information: Detailed analysis of Binoid's shipping and delivery features, checkout process, and order management systems.

pricing.shipping_fees: Vary depending on order size and destination. Surcharges may apply for rushed orders, special handling (insurance, temperature control).
pricing.free_shipping_threshold_domestic: $50 (within United States). FAQ states $75 for standard shipping.
pricing.international_shipping_fee: Flat rate fee based on destination country's postal service rates.

details: Standard shipping: typically 3-5 days for delivery.
Express shipping: usually 2-3 days for delivery.
All methods are trackable from start to finish.
Local pickup option available near store locations.
Packages are secure and discreetly packed (no product information revealed).
Extensive network of carriers.
Offers same-day delivery in select areas (per FAQ).
Expedited delivery options.
Option for insured shipments.
Utilizes eco-friendly packaging materials.
Orders are shipped out quickly, usually within 24 hours.
International customers can choose airmail or courier services.
All orders processed within 24 hours (excluding weekends and holidays).
Tracking numbers provided for all orders.
Delivery times can vary; FAQ states orders typically take 1-3 business days to arrive depending on shipping option.
Certain items may not be eligible for international or domestic shipment due to customs regulations and product availability (per FAQ).
Variety of payment methods accepted, including major credit cards and PayPal.
Customers are advised to consider all cost-related expenses before finalizing a purchase.
Order tracking system: accessible via a 'track my order' link on the website; requires tracking number emailed upon order placement.
Account tracking: Free account creation allows users to log in and view all past orders with integrated tracking.
Customer service support for tracking: Updates available within 24 hours via call or email.
Delivery flexibility options: Arrange delivery to another address or schedule a pick-up time from partner stores.
Returns policy: 14-day returns policy for exchanges of unwanted items.
Refund/Exchange policy: Full refund or exchange within 30 days of purchase (less shipping and handling fees) (per FAQ).
Hassle-free returns process for defective items.
Money-back guarantee if customers are not satisfied with their order.
Customer service team available for questions, resolving issues during shipment, and providing updates on specific shipments.

temporal_info.return_exchange_period_2: 30 days (for full refund or exchange, less S&H fees)
